UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile within the NEU Library Visitor App, storing their institutional details and preferences.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

email.description: The user's institutional email address, used for login and identification.

displayName.description: The user's full name as provided by their identity provider.

photoURL.description: The URL to the user's profile picture.

role.description: The assigned role of the user (e.g., 'Admin', 'User').

collegeOrOffice.description: The user's selected college or office within the university. This information is collected during the first-time user onboarding.

isBlocked.description: Indicates if the user has been blocked from accessing library services by an administrator.

isSetupComplete.description: Indicates if the user has completed the onboarding flow.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user profile was first created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user profile was last updated.

LibraryVisit.title: LibraryVisit
LibraryVisit.description: Records a specific visit by a user to the library, including their stated reason for the visit.

id.description: Unique identifier for the LibraryVisit entity.

userId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who made this visit.

displayName.description: Snapshot of the user's display name at the time of the visit.

email.description: Snapshot of the user's email at the time of the visit.

collegeOrOffice.description: Snapshot of the user's college/office at the time of the visit.

reasonForVisit.description: The user's stated purpose or reason for visiting the library.

visitDateTime.description: The date and time when the library visit was recorded.

definition.description: Stores user-specific data such as email, college/office, and timestamps.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

definition.description: Stores individual library visit records in a flat collection for administrative efficiency.

params.name: visitId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific library visit.

definition.description: Lookup collection to verify administrative privileges.
